guide.expanded.title: Vampirism Expanded
guide.expanded.overview.text:
Expanded adds new hunter and vampire skill trees that build on Vampirism's existing systems.
Use the other entries in this chapter to learn how each part works in practice.
skill.expanded.poisonous_blood.desc: Your blood becomes toxic to vampires that try to drink it.
guide.expanded.poisonous_blood.text:
Poisonous Blood makes your blood toxic to vampires. When a vampire attempts to drink from you, the feeding is interrupted and they are briefly poisoned.
This skill works best when you can force enemies into risky feeding attempts.
skill.expanded.garlic_blood.desc: Your blood carries the stench of garlic. Vampires who drink from you become affected by Garlic for 10 seconds.
guide.expanded.garlic_blood.text:
Garlic Blood makes your blood smell and taste like garlic to vampires. If a vampire successfully drinks from you, they gain Garlic for 10 seconds after the sip.
Unlike Poisonous Blood, this effect triggers after the feeding succeeds.
